name: OpenHerPersona
description: Pure asynchronous persona observation and measurement plugin. It never injects prompt text, never emits brk/HTML hints, never asks for persona_delta JSON, and never uses wall-clock emotional decay or keyword heuristics. It observes per-agent messages through subject-anchored secondary vector axes, computes cognitive/affective/drive/psychological-gender measurements, applies soft coupling, serializes concurrent observations through per-agent queues, and persists openher_axis_* SQLite state for dashboards and later experiments.
author: Nova

invocationCommands.description:
Return current async observer configuration, queue status, known agents, and the selected agent axis snapshot. Does not call an LLM and never mutates prompts.
- `command`: fixed as `status`.
- Optional: `agent` / `agentKey` / `agentLabel` to select an agent.
invocationCommands.example:
<<<[TOOL_REQUEST]>>>
tool_name: 「始」OpenHerPersona「末」,
command: 「始」status「末」,
agent: 「始」Nova「末」
<<<[END_TOOL_REQUEST]>>>

invocationCommands.description:
Alias of status, intended for dashboards that only need the latest measured axes.
- `command`: fixed as `snapshot`.
- Optional: `agent` / `agentKey` / `agentLabel`.
invocationCommands.example:
<<<[TOOL_REQUEST]>>>
tool_name: 「始」OpenHerPersona「末」,
command: 「始」snapshot「末」,
agent: 「始」Nova「末」
<<<[END_TOOL_REQUEST]>>>

invocationCommands.description:
Reset one agent's observer state and subject-anchored vectors. Does not touch long-term VCP memory.
- `command`: fixed as `reset`.
- Optional: `agent` / `agentKey` / `agentLabel`.
invocationCommands.example:
<<<[TOOL_REQUEST]>>>
tool_name: 「始」OpenHerPersona「末」,
command: 「始」reset「末」,
agent: 「始」Nova「末」
<<<[END_TOOL_REQUEST]>>>

invocationCommands.description:
Explain the observer-only architecture boundaries and removed prompt-injection behavior.
- `command`: fixed as `explain`.
